summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Landing Page + Guest Mode features for 'The Room' learning platform. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All 18 frontend features verified (100%). Landing page renders correctly with hero, features bento grid, how-it-works steps, testimonials, and CTA sections. Guest mode works correctly - can browse courses/lessons but cannot send chat messages (403).
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/guest returns token and guest user with role='guest'
Backend: Guest token is valid JWT format
Backend: Guest can GET /api/courses (read access)
Backend: Guest can GET /api/courses/{id} (course detail)
Backend: Guest can GET /api/courses/{id}/lessons (lessons list)
Backend: Guest cannot POST /api/chat (returns 403)
Backend: Guest cannot POST /api/lessons/{id}/comments (returns 403)
Backend: Guest can GET /api/chat (read messages)
Backend: Admin login works via /api/auth/login
Backend: Admin can POST /api/chat (send messages)
Backend: Demo group with DEMO2026 invite code exists
Frontend: Landing page renders at / when not authenticated (desktop)
Frontend: Landing page renders at / when not authenticated (mobile 390x844)
Frontend: Hero section has 'Get started free' button
Frontend: Hero section has 'Try the demo' button
Frontend: Header has 'Log in' button
Frontend: Header has 'Sign up free' button
Frontend: Header has 'Try Demo' link
Frontend: Features bento grid has 5 feature cards (Courses, Groups, Chat, Video, Collaborate)
Frontend: 'How It Works' section has 3 steps (01, 02, 03)
Frontend: CTA section has 'Get started free' and 'Try the demo' buttons
Frontend: Footer displays correctly
Frontend: 'Log in' button opens auth modal in login mode
Frontend: 'Sign up free' button opens auth modal in register mode
Frontend: Auth modal has email + password fields for login
Frontend: Auth modal has name + invite code + email + password for register
Frontend: Auth modal switches between login and register via toggle links
Frontend: Auth modal has 'Try demo (read-only)' button
Frontend: 'Try the demo' button logs in as guest and redirects to /dashboard
Frontend: Guest user sees 'You're browsing as a guest (read-only)' banner
Frontend: Guest user can browse courses page and see 5 courses
Frontend: Guest user can click into a course and view lessons
Frontend: Guest cannot send chat messages (shows error toast)
Frontend: Admin login via modal works correctly
Frontend: Authenticated user at / sees Dashboard (not landing page)
Frontend: Mobile responsiveness of landing page verified
critical_code_review_comments: LandingPage.jsx correctly implements all required sections with proper data-testid attributes
AuthModal component properly toggles between login and register modes
Guest login endpoint creates JWT with 4-hour expiry and guest role (auth.py lines 377-403)
require_non_guest guard correctly blocks guest write operations (auth.py lines 73-76)
social.py routes use require_non_guest for chat and comment endpoints
AuthContext.js properly handles guest session with guestLogin() method
Layout.jsx displays guest banner with data-testid='guest-banner'
HomeRoute component in App.js correctly shows LandingPage for unauthenticated users
Mobile responsiveness works well with proper viewport handling
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page + guest mode fully tested. Key verifications: 1) Landing page shows at / for unauthenticated users with hero, features, how-it-works, testimonials, CTA sections, 2) Auth modal opens in login/register modes correctly, 3) Guest login creates 4-hour JWT with guest role, 4) Guest can read courses/lessons but cannot write (chat/comments return 403), 5) Admin login still works, 6) Authenticated users see Dashboard at /, 7) Mobile responsiveness verified.

landing_page.hero_section: VERIFIED - 'Get started free' and 'Try the demo' buttons present
landing_page.features_bento_grid: VERIFIED - 5 feature cards (Courses, Groups, Chat, Video, Collaborate)
landing_page.how_it_works: VERIFIED - 3 steps (Create group, Build courses, Learn together)
landing_page.testimonials: VERIFIED - Social proof section with avatars and quote
landing_page.cta_section: VERIFIED - 'Get started free' and 'Try the demo' buttons
landing_page.mobile_responsive: VERIFIED - All sections render correctly on 390x844 viewport

auth_modal.login_mode: VERIFIED - Email + password fields, 'Sign in' button
auth_modal.register_mode: VERIFIED - Name + invite code + email + password, 'Create account' button
auth_modal.mode_toggle: VERIFIED - 'Sign up' and 'Log in' links switch modes

guest_mode.guest_login: VERIFIED - POST /api/auth/guest returns token with role='guest'
guest_mode.guest_banner: VERIFIED - 'You're browsing as a guest (read-only)' banner shown
guest_mode.read_access: VERIFIED - Guest can view courses, course details, lessons
guest_mode.write_restriction: VERIFIED - Guest cannot send chat messages (403)

admin_login.via_modal: VERIFIED - Admin can login through auth modal
admin_login.dashboard_redirect: VERIFIED - Authenticated users see Dashboard at /
admin_login.chat_access: VERIFIED - Admin can send chat messages
